series_metadata.series_title: Reimbursing Negotiable Security and Surety Bond Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains, but is not limited to, Reimbursing Employer Application, Treasurer of State receipts and release correspondence, inventory of securities with Treasurer of State, Reimbursing Employer Surety Bonds and related Continuation Certificates, Riders, Power of Attorney and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office 2. of inactivity subsequent effective discontinuance date and upon proper disposition of all debits and security instrument, image and certify ; Electronic: in System enterprise which account was established is no longer in operation and its account has not been chargeable a period of 7 years, and there are no outstanding debts
